description:
Comprehensive regression tests for the entire scope-completion validation/review pipeline.

## What to test

1. `/bw run` does NOT stop as `completed` while workers are still active
2. `/bw run` does NOT stop as `completed` while exited-unverified workers exist
3. `/bw run` does NOT stop as `completed` while scope validation/review has unresolved `fix` findings
4. Scope-complete validation runs once at quiescence for epic/scope runs
5. Scope-level `fix` findings create fix-forward beadwork work
6. Scope-level findings do NOT mutate already-verified worker records
7. Quiescent dirty-state remediation runs BEFORE scope-completion validation
8. Dirty-state remediation NEVER runs while workers are still active
9. Standalone `/bw delegate <ticket>` treats ticket as scope, runs validation once
10. Standalone delegate does NOT run extra scope-complete review
11. Scope-level fix iterations capped at 2 rounds
12. Not converged after 2 rounds → `attention`
13. Validation failure at scope level routes to remediation/attention
14. Clean quiescence → validation → scope review → `completed` flow works end-to-end
15. Worktree mode scope behavior preserved (existing landing pipeline)

## Tests Location

`packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/scope-completion.test.ts`

## Definition of Done

- All 15+ scenarios pass
- Tests use mocked beadwork/git/process for isolation
- Tests document the scope-completion contract
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean
title: Add Phase 4 scope-completion regression tests
